The request body must include the policy version number. Returns confirmation of the receipt record. This operation is essential for compliance and verifying policy delivery to policyholders.
data.reasoning: Summary is too generic ('Create a policy receipt'). Description is overly detailed with implementation examples that obscure the core purpose. Improved summary clarifies the action (recording delivery confirmation). Improved description concisely explains both receipt methods, required inputs (version number), return value, and business purpose, making it more actionable for AI agents while removing implementation noise.
